data.title: Explore Investments
data.subtitle: Let's discuss your real estate investment strategy.

data.bio: Kevin Park advises investors on residential and commercial real estate opportunities in northern New Jersey. With a background in finance and 8 years in real estate, he specializes in multi-family properties, rental yield analysis, and 1031 exchange planning.
